source=docs
mode=supported
kind=run
url=https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax#jobsjob_idservices
docs_urls=https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax#jobsjob_idcontainer;https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/workflows-and-actions/workflow-syntax#jobsjob_idservices
added_at=2026-03-13
notes=job container and services share a docker network so service name resolution can work through service_id aliases
